text.title: Debt Scoring Rubric Decision Tree
text.summary: Routes a scoring session by anchor sign-off → evidence → formula consistency. Branches name observable register features.

decision-tree.root-question: Are prerequisites satisfied: ≥5 candidate items, metric sources accessible, stakeholder available?

branch.question: Is anchors_signed_off_by populated AND a named human?
For every item, are change_freq_source + fragility_source + blast_source populated with non-empty references?
Does score == (user_impact × change_frequency × fragility × blast_radius) / fix_cost for every item?

text.example: prereqs_met=true → anchors signed by pm@acme.com → evidence sources populated → formula matches per item → verdict=publish-register (ref run-the-checklist).
